steps.title: Identify the crucial signal
steps.content: The claim specifies that appearance conveys exaggerated importance. We need a quotation where physical presentation—bearing or carriage—directly demonstrates this self-regard.

steps.title: Match evidence to claim
steps.content:
The triumphal arch metaphor in choice A directly illustrates his bearing as expressing grandiose self-importance—his physical carriage embodies his exaggerated sense of himself.

B and C describe clothing without connecting it to self-regard; D discusses speech.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
